{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323174258EC91AB735E44FA171D4D"}"},"total":586},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7219310016590283575","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，真希望作者一口气更一百章。啊啊啊，这本书应该推给所有喜欢看女攻的姐妹，男主的性格我超爱，有点病娇但又有点娇弱，女主强，但不是无脑强，嘿嘿嘿，超爱这种题材，这本书四爱姐妹不看后悔一辈子！！！我宣布这本书将成为我的Top1，太合我胃口了！！！希望作者一直更下去，我永远支持你！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1680876682,"group_id":"7193689400843176960","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104307077973"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7193689400843176960","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.251406e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12514,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":31},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7208894236668969784","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"呜呜呜，嘎嘎好看，男主又是病娇又娇软，啊啊啊，是我的爱，女攻。但有一个不足！！！太少啦！！！！跪求作者多更点[爱慕][爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1678451577,"group_id":"7193689400843176960","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看不懂我说话的人可以别回我吗，看着烦","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6Kqdy/PEzS2+TtK7CHP1AA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a9e65253303c45de96fffef2837bd9ea~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793863&x-signature=az6uuqUZfDYm0U%2BWvxf4XoGmLSA%3D","user_id":"104307077973","user_name":"晚安许愿啦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104307077973","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7193689400843176960","book_info":{"abstract":"【女攻+病娇+黑莲花+甜宠+男主动心就变恋爱脑】
小世界1v1，没有切片
颜欢突然想辞职不干了。
谁能告诉她，为什么她打算退休前接这么一个烂摊子…… 作为时空管理局的优秀任务者，她一向不太在意任务的内容，可是为什么……她能拿到这么离谱的剧本啊！！！
杀人如麻的双面间谍黑莲花，最爱鲜血喷涌的时刻……
酷爱自虐的医仙谷漂亮小谷主，以折磨人为乐……
还有绿茶小学弟明面乖巧可爱，背地里却是冷心冷情……
要跟他们正常的谈个恋爱？ 那就，硬着头皮上吧。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o616af730171d6cde5b7703954d2d9da7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"青蚨多多","author_id":"","book_id":"7193689400843176960","book_name":"快穿：当我把病娇宠成了娇夫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0c0b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5336人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7193689651306037815","read_count":"5336","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1065729"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"452","tags":"快穿,现代言情,系统,幻想言情,穿越,甜宠,病娇","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d698528b189d1bcf1282c1fc6089ab91~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442978&x-signature=mKm60csINjvo6RkgGbyJ7qdpNys%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2876796587487767","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.289796e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323174258EC91AB735E44FA171D4D"}"},"relate_info_l
